benefit.en: Guaranteed minimum pension of rupees 1,000 to 5,000 per month after age 60, depending on contribution. Government co-contributes for early enrollees.
benefit.hi: 60 वर्ष की आयु के बाद 1,000 से 5,000 रुपये मासिक न्यूनतम पेंशन

eligibility_rules_human: Indian citizen aged 18 to 40 with a savings bank or post office account, not an income-tax payer, who can contribute monthly until age 60. Auto-debit of contribution from the linked account.
